'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 71''' was the seventy-first issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[May 7]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Crisis on the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']]
*[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]
*[[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]]
*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] - [[Spaceport/Legends|Starship Terminals]]
*[[TC-14/Legends|TC-14]]
*[[Ryyk blade/Legends|Ryyk Blades]]
*[[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|All Terrain Personal Transport]] (AT-PT)
*[[Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery]]-Turbolaser (SPHA-T)
